title: Brazilian Toast
description: A simple and delicious Brazilian-style toast with soft and fluffy texture. Perfect for a quick breakfast or snack.
instructions: Slice the Brazilian bread into 1-inch thick slices.
In a bowl, mix the beaten eggs, salt (if using), and melted butter.
Dip each bread slice into the egg mixture, coating both sides evenly.
Place the coated bread slices on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Sprinkle shredded cheese on top of each bread slice.
Bake in the preheated oven for 10-12 minutes, or until golden brown.
